mechanism: Potent FLT3 inhibitor, including resistant FLT3 mutants
Inhibits FLT3 and related receptor tyrosine kinases
additional_notes: Sensitivity observed in FLT3-ITD AML models

mechanism: Inhibits Src/ABL/KIT and can inhibit FLT3 signaling
additional_notes: Context-dependent potency; activity seen in FLT3-ITD AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 to suppress FLT3-ITD–driven MAPK signaling
additional_notes: AML preclinical data; MOLM-13 sensitivity reported

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 to block MAPK pathway
additional_notes: AML lines show in vitro sensitivity
Pathway inhibition at low–mid nM; viability effects can extend to sub-µM
Strong activity in AML lines including MOLM-13

mechanism: Pan-HDAC inhibition causing epigenetic modulation and apoptosis
additional_notes: Very potent in AML lines, including MOLM-13
Modest single-agent AML activity; can impact FLT3/JAK crosstalk and combinations

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, inducing ROS and apoptosis
additional_notes: Cytotoxic in FLT3-ITD AML cells including MOLM-13

mechanism: ALDH inhibition; with Cu(II) forms a proteotoxic/ROS-inducing complex
additional_notes: Requires copper cofactor for potent activity; weaker without copper

mechanism: Disrupts microtubules leading to mitotic arrest
additional_notes: Anthelmintic with in vitro anti-leukemic activity
